subcodes.first_line: O Yahya! Upon thee be My glory! Reflect thou upon the exaltation of the Most High Word and the dominion of the Most Exalted Pen, bereft of helper [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یحیی علیک بهائی در اعزاز کلمه علیا و اقتدار قلم اعلی تفکر نما من غیر ناصر
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @the power of words; of speech, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
